channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Canada wins bronze in mixed doubles curling at world championship
item.description: Canada’s Kadriana and Colton Lott captured a bronze medal at the 2026 World Mixed Doubles Curling Championship in Geneva, defeating Italy’s Stefania Constantini and Amos Mosaner 11-3. The married duo ...

item.title: Toronto police not charged after man falls from high-rise balcony on New Year’s Eve
item.description: The Special Investigations Unit (SIU) has concluded that Toronto police officers were not criminally responsible for the death of a 27-year-old man who fell from a high-rise balcony on New Year’s Eve....

item.title: Auntie Jemimah Opens Up About How Motherhood Changed Her and Why She's Not Interested in Marriage
item.description: Auntie Jemimah, a well-known Kenyan media personality, has shared her personal journey of why she has chosen not to marry. Speaking in an interview, she revealed that her perspective on marriage shift...

item.title: NSPCC former director reflects on introduction of Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor and Peter Mandelson amid Epstein association
item.description: The former director of fundraising at the NSPCC, Giles Pegram, has expressed deep regret over his role in introducing Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor to Peter Mandelson during the charity's Full Stop campa...

item.title: Commission Confirms Findings on October 2025 Unrest Based on Evidence
item.description: The Commission of Inquiry on the October 29th, 2025 unrest in Tanzania has confirmed that its report is credible and based on thorough evidence, proper methodology, and public engagement. Chaired by r...

item.title: Atin Ito Coalition continues civilian missions in West Philippine Sea despite Chinese objections
item.description: The civilian-led Atin Ito (This is Ours) Coalition has reiterated its commitment to continue missions in the West Philippine Sea, rejecting recent statements from the Chinese Embassy that their activi...

item.title: EC mandates full repoll in Falta citing widespread electoral irregularities in West Bengal polls
item.description: The Election Commission of India (ECI) has ordered a complete repoll in the Falta Assembly constituency of West Bengal on May 21, following reports of serious electoral malpractices during the second ...

item.title: Centrist Democrats plan policy forum focused on affordability and economic messaging
item.description: Centrist Democrats are preparing a more organized affordability message ahead of the midterm elections through a new policy forum hosted by the Effective Governing Coalition, a nonprofit aligned with ...

item.title: Delta Police Accused of Shielding Officer After Extrajudicial Killing
item.description: People for Delta State dey vex after video show say ASP Nuhu Usman kill Mene Ogidi wey dem handcuffed, even as the man dey beg for him life. Social Patriotic Youths Initiative and Urhobo Progress Unio...

item.title: 17 African Countries That Renamed Themselves to Honour Their Heritage After Colonialism
item.description: Many African countries were renamed by their colonial masters during European rule, and even after independence, some of these countries took steps to reclaim their identity by changing their names. F...

item.title: Former DHS Official Criticizes Trump’s Proposed White House Ballroom as Politically Harmful to Republicans
item.description: Former Department of Homeland Security official Miles Taylor criticized President Donald Trump’s proposed $400 million White House ballroom, describing it as an unnecessary “vanity project” that could...

item.title: Ohio GOP Faces Concerns Over Former ICE Deputy's Primary Impact in 9th District
item.description: Ohio Republicans are expressing concern that Madison Sheahan, former Deputy Director of Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) under the Trump administration, could complicate their chances of flip...

item.title: Researchers Observe Negative Dwell Time of Photons in Atomic Clouds
item.description: Physicists have conducted an experiment demonstrating that photons, when passing through a cloud of rubidium atoms, can appear to spend a negative amount of time within the atomic cloud. The experimen...

item.title: Why Investors Should Stay Committed to Canadian National Railway Despite Recent Volatility
item.description: Canadian National Railway (CNR) has experienced significant volatility in its share price over the past two years, with brief rallies failing to lift its stock out of a slump. While some investors may...

item.title: Kenya Eases Fuel Standards Temporarily to Ensure Steady Supply Amid Global Disruptions
item.description: The Kenyan government has temporarily relaxed its fuel standards in response to global supply disruptions. This decision was made in light of challenges faced in sourcing fuel that complies with curre...

item.title: Tanzania and Belarus Agree on Stronger Cooperation in Trade, Energy and Other Sectors
item.description: Dar es Salaam — Tanzania na Belarus wamekubaliana kuimarisha mahusiano yao ya kidiplomasia na kupanua ushirikiano katika sekta muhimu kama vile nishati, miundombinu, uwekezaji, elimu, kilimo, teknoloj...

item.title: Prevention in Tanzania: Why We Wait for Crisis Before Acting
item.description: In Tanzania, the approach to addressing problems seems to favor reaction over prevention. This article, written by Beatrice Materu, highlights how warning signs are ignored until disasters are inevita...

item.title: Showcasing the Top 15 Evening Gowns at Miss Universe Philippines 2026
item.description: Miss Universe Philippines 2026 highlighted the elegance and creativity of the Top 15 evening gowns showcased during the pageant. Designers and contestants collaborated to present gowns that combined m...

item.title: 18-Year-Old Influencer Alleges Sexual Assault and Fraud by Streamer Clavicular
item.description: Aleksandra Mendoza, known online as Alorah Ziva, an 18-year-old social media influencer who promotes herself as a top female 'looksmaxxer,' has filed a lawsuit against streamer Braden Eric Peters, als...

item.title: Four Hospitalised After Shooting in Brixton, One in Critical Condition
item.description: Early on Saturday morning, Brixton, south London, witnessed a serious shooting incident that resulted in four individuals being taken to hospital. At approximately 1:14am, the Metropolitan Police were...
